diagrams.title: ABAC Architecture Components
diagrams.description: Shows the four main components of ABAC architecture and their interactions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how ABAC components work together for access control decisions

diagrams.title: ABAC Access Request Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of how an access request is processed in ABAC
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete lifecycle of an ABAC access request from request to enforcement

diagrams.title: Four Categories of ABAC Attributes
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the four types of attributes used in ABAC policy evaluation
elements: Subject Attributes: role, department, clearance, job title, certifications
Resource Attributes: type, owner, classification, sensitivity, department
Action Attributes: read, write, delete, execute, print, copy
Environment Attributes: time, location, device, network, threat level
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing and understanding the different attribute categories and their examples
